action.reasoning: Observation: 90% success rate on training maps, explored_rate ~1.0 for successful episodes. Distances are 196-557m. Analysis: The planner works well but some episodes fail at 0.9997-0.9999 explored_rate. Need to submit eval to get baseline score. Decision: Submit eval immediately to measure baseline, then optimize for higher success rate and shorter paths.
